text: Inside these cool, glass-encased rooms, I feel the echo of silence aching to be filled with questions and ideas. The hallway’s clinical brightness opens abruptly into a space celebrating experimentation—the wall before me shouts "R+D" and invites curiosity. The glowing screens speak of confusion and blurred perception, mirroring my own sense of partial understanding in this unfamiliar, almost expectant place. I am aware of potential; a laboratory of thought. Here, to doubt is to begin.
